message:
feat(notifications): add SSRF protection and Slack mrkdwn escaping

notification.service.ts security enhancements:

SSRF protection:
- New isPrivateNetworkUrl() function validates webhook URLs
- Blocks localhost, 127.0.0.1, ::1, .localhost domains
- Blocks private IPv4 ranges: 10.0.0.0/8, 172.16-31.0.0/12, 192.168.0.0/16
- Blocks link-local (169.254.0.0/16) including AWS metadata endpoint
- Returns WEBHOOK_SSRF_BLOCKED error for disallowed URLs

Slack mrkdwn escaping:
- escapeSlackMrkdwn(): Escapes & < > per Slack spec
- escapeSlackUrl(): Also escapes | for <URL|text> format
- Prevents injection attacks via user-controlled content in notifications

agent-analytics.service.ts:
- Refactored metric calculations

useCollabGraph.ts:
- Enhanced collaboration graph subscriptions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
